query: ALTER TABLE inspection_records ADD COLUMN building_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', ADD COLUMN station_id INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN floor VARCHAR(50) NULL, ADD COLUMN watch_number VARCHAR(10) NULL, ADD COLUMN inspection_datetime DATETIME NULL, ADD COLUMN referral_department_id INT NULL
